name: Skinny Guacamole
recipeIngredient: 2 small tomatillos, skinned, rinsed and quartered
1/4 cup canned diced green chilies (I used Ortega)
1 avocado, peeled, pitted, and cut into several pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Using a blender or food processor, process the tomatillos with garlic, chilies, and cilantro until pureed.
2. Add the avocado and sour cream, processing just enough to combine.
3. Season to taste with salt, pepper, hot sauce, and lime juice.
4. Stir in onions and tomatoes by hand.
